description: Prove that mapping g after mapping f is the same as mapping the composition g ∘ f.
preamble:
def map {α β : Type} (f : α → β) : List α → List β
  | [] => []
  | x :: xs => f x :: map f xs
statement:
theorem map_comp {α β γ : Type} (f : α → β) (g : β → γ)
      (xs : List α) :
    map g (map f xs) = map (fun x ↦ g (f x)) xs
